_comment: Single source of truth for per-class budget ceilings and naming, shared by the meridian_export Blender addon and the CI validators (Art SAD §2.1 AR2). Numbers are direct Art PRD figures; ranges take the TOP of the band as the LOD0 ceiling. Kept in lockstep with tools/validate_content.py ASSET_BUDGETS.

character_model.cite: Art PRD §2.1 player character body 45-60k / §2.3 2048² ≤ 24 MB

creature_model.cite: Art PRD §2.1 large creature/boss 60-90k / §2.3 boss 4096² ≤ 64 MB

armor_model.cite: Art PRD §2.1 armor set piece 3-8k / §2.3 ≤ 32 MB

kit_piece.cite: Art PRD §2.1 env kit piece ≤ 20k / §2.3/§2.4 ≤ 12 sets ≤ 224 MB

hero_landmark.cite: Art PRD §2.1 hero landmark / POI piece 40-80k
